page: Microsoft Azure E64d_v4 is an EDv4-family virtual machine configured with 64 vCPUs and 504.0 GB of RAM, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The underlying hardware features an Intel Xeon 8272CL x86_64 processor operating at 2.6 GHz, containing 32 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. This instance includes 2458 GB of local storage and does not feature any GPU accelerators.

Benchmark results indicate strong memory bandwidth performance, with uncached large-block read speeds reaching 180.04 GB/sec and write speeds at 87.34 GB/sec, both placing in the top 25% tier. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression is also strong at 254.73 GB/sec, alongside a strong Passmark CPU extended instructions test score of 58095.88. However, the instance exhibits performance trade-offs in LLM text generation, where it records a poor speed of 41.91 tokens/sec for a small 135M model and a weak speed of 6.43 tokens/sec for a medium 7B model. Most other compute, database, and web serving benchmarks fall within the average range.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the high memory-to-vCPU ratio of approximately 7.88 GB per core, combined with substantial local storage, provides a dense resource profile for memory-intensive workloads. The server is configured for workloads such as large relational databases, in-memory caching systems, data analytics, and memory-heavy enterprise applications that benefit from high memory bandwidth and local scratch space, while it is less suitable for active LLM text generation tasks.
description: The Microsoft Azure E64d_v4 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the EDv4 family, powered by an Intel Xeon 8272CL x86_64 processor running at 2.6 GHz. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs, 504.0 GB of RAM, and 2458 GB of local storage, with no GPU acceleration. Benchmarks show strong memory bandwidth, with uncached large-block reads at 180.04 GB/sec and writes at 87.34 GB/sec, alongside strong multi-threaded bzip3 decompression. However, it exhibits weak to poor performance in LLM text generation tasks. This server provides a resource-dense profile for memory-intensive applications, making it suitable for large databases, in-memory caching, and data analytics workloads requiring substantial memory capacity and local storage.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E64d_v4 is a memory-optimized VM featuring 64 vCPUs, 504 GB RAM, and 2458 GB local storage, delivering strong memory bandwidth for database and in-memory workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E64d_v4 is a memory-optimized VM with 64 vCPUs, 504 GB RAM, and 2458 GB local storage, built for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring sixty-four vCPUs, substantial local storage, and strong memory bandwidth for data-intensive enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated vCPUs and 504.0 GB of RAM
Strong memory bandwidth of 180.04 GB/sec for large-block reads
Intel Xeon 8272CL x86_64 processor running at 2.6 GHz
Suited for large databases, in-memory caching, and data analytics
Weak performance for LLM text generation workloads
